title: M5: Auth types + Neo4j adapter for Auth.js — custom adapter storing User/Account/VerificationToken nodes in Neo4j, using @auth/core with JWT sessions
M5: Auth config + API route handlers — @auth/core setup with Credentials + Google OAuth providers, catch-all route at /api/auth/[...path]
M5: Session helpers + auth middleware — getSession() for server components, useSession() hook for client components, requireAuth() guard
M5: Auth UI — sign-in page, sign-up page, user menu component with tier badges

Investigation Neo4j query functions
description: lib/investigation/queries.ts: createInvestigation, getInvestigationBySlug, updateInvestigation, deleteInvestigation, listPublishedInvestigations, getUserInvestigations, publishInvestigation (creates REFERENCES edges)

title: Investigation CRUD API routes
description: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/investigations, GET /api/investigations (list), GET /api/investigations/[slug] (detail). Auth-protected write ops, public read for published.

title: TipTap editor component with toolbar
description: components/investigation/InvestigationEditor.tsx: TipTap editor with heading, bold, italic, link, image, lists, blockquote. Toolbar component. GraphNodeEmbed custom extension.

title: Investigation create/edit pages
description: /investigacion/nueva and /investigacion/[slug]/editar with title, TipTap body, tags. Auth-protected.

title: Investigation reading page
description: /investigacion/[slug] SSR with TipTap HTML, embedded graph nodes, author info, OG tags

title: Investigations index + my investigations
description: /investigaciones published grid with tag filters. /mis-investigaciones user dashboard.
